slides.title: JVA Internship Board
slides.subtitle: Company Onboarding Guide
slides.catchphrase: How to partner with us and what to expect

left.label: Global Students
left.description: English-proficient interns from top universities in Japan. Business~Native English, beginner Japanese (N3–N5).

right.label: Startups & Companies
right.description: Early-stage startups seeking global talent. Free job listing, no hiring fees.

items.title: Introduce IB
items.description: Explain how the platform works — free listing, LINE distribution, global student pool.

items.title: Student Profile
items.description: English-focused, top universities, beginner Japanese. 46+ students registered.

items.title: Realistic Requirements
items.description: 15–25h/week, N3 or lower Japanese, remote-friendly. Increases match rate significantly.

items.title: Platform Rules
items.description: 4-business-day response SLA. Get verbal agreement before moving to next step.

slides.title: Step 2: Job Card Form — Key Fields

steps.title: Create Job Card
steps.description: Build Job Card from form responses. Review for accuracy and match potential.

steps.title: Review & Approve
steps.description: Check requirements are realistic. Confirm company contact details are correct.

steps.title: Distribute via LINE
steps.description: Add to next weekly LINE broadcast. Automated email set up via GAS for incoming applications.

before.title: If they DON'T respond
points: Student is left waiting with no update
IB sends a reminder after 4 business days
Second reminder within 2 weeks if still no reply

after.title: If they DO respond in time
points: Applicant gets a fast, professional experience
Company builds a good reputation on IB
Listing stays active and continues to receive applicants

items.title: Listing temporarily suspended
items.description: Removed from active distribution until resolved

items.title: Listing removed
items.description: Until company confirms commitment to SLA

events.title: Wait for company response
events.description: Application delivered to company via automated email

events.title: Send reminder (if no reply)
events.description: IB follows up with company contact

events.title: Check selection status
events.description: Update IB records — rejected / interview / offer

events.title: Review listing activity
events.description: Confirm position is still active and receiving applications

messages.text: Hi [Name], thank you for partnering with JVA Internship Board!
You'll receive student applications via email as they come in. Please reply within 4 business days of receiving a CV.
If we don't hear back, we'll follow up with a quick reminder. We'll also check in periodically to track selection progress.
Looking forward to finding you a great intern! Feel free to reach out anytime.

slides.message: Let's find your next great intern.
